titel: Activities within the Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe (OSCE) during the second half of 2023 and the entire year of 2024.
html: In this document, the government outlines its activities within the Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe (OSCE) during the second half of 2023 and the entire year of 2024.
tldr: The government is providing an overview of the work conducted within the Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe (OSCE) during the latter part of 2023 and throughout 2024. This report details the activities and developments within the organization that is dedicated to promoting security in Europe.
lattlast:
The government has published a document explaining what has happened within the Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe (OSCE). The OSCE is a group of countries that work together to promote peace and security in Europe.

The text covers the period from the second half of 2023 to the end of 2024. In the document, the government outlines the progress made during these years.

The purpose of this information is to demonstrate the activities undertaken within this international cooperation framework and to provide an overview of the security work carried out during this period.
